metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_4517
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Neurocan inhibits Sema3F-induced spine retraction. Fig. 3 A shows apical dendrites and spines of mouse cortical neurons expressing EGFP in cultures treated with Fc or Sema3F-Fc. Pretreatment with 20 nM Neurocan prevented Sema3F-Fc induced spine collapse but did not affect spine density in Fc-treated control cultures. (B) Quantification of experiment in panel A, showing significant reduction in mean spine density upon Sema3F-Fc treatment by Neurocan. (C) NrCAM enhances Neurocan action as lower concentrations of Neurocan (8 nM) have a similar effect in preventing Sema3F-Fc induced spine collapse and did not affect spine density in Fc-treated control cultures.

Related to annotations ID 1889 and ID 2762. Experimental description: "C57BL/6 WT mice (P18 and P80) were anesthetized and perfused transcardially with phosphate buffer..." p.2
